news.summary: A new Corner Bakery Cafe® location is set to open in Irvine, California at 13652 Jamboree Rd. on June 16, 2025. This will be the brand's 30th location in the state, highlighting its expansion in Southern California. The cafe is expected to bring its signature offerings to customers in the heart of Irvine.
news.headline: Corner Bakery Cafe opens 30th location in Irvine at 13652 Jamboree Rd on June 16, 2025, adding fresh flavors to Southern California.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, NOVAGOLD RESOURCES INC. announced they are set to unveil their 2025 second-quarter report on June 25, 2025, before the market opens. The report will be discussed in a conference call and video webcast at 8:00 am PT (9:00 am MT/11:00 am ET). NOVAGOLD is listed on the NYSE American and TSX under the symbol NG.
news.headline: NOVAGOLD to release Q2 report on June 25, 2025, followed by conference call and webcast at 8:00 am PT.

news.summary: VIQ Solutions Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its annual general shareholder meeting held on June 13, 2025. The company, recognized on the TSX as VQS, specializes in AI-enhanced digital voice and video capture solutions as well as transcription services. Shareholders voted affirmatively on all agenda items outlined in the Circular, dated May 1, 2025. The meeting saw the participation of 16,990,031 common shares.
news.headline: VIQ Solutions reports successful voting results with 16,990,031 common shares at its annual meeting.

news.summary: KULR, trading on the NYSE American, revealed a significant decision to conduct a reverse stock split of its common stock. The ratio is set at 1-for-8, meaning shareholders will receive one share for every eight they currently hold. This move aims to consolidate the company's outstanding shares and potentially boost the stock's market value. This alteration will reduce the number of outstanding shares, which currently stands at a multiple of eight times the current total stock count.
news.headline: KULR to consolidate shares with 1-for-8 reverse stock split on NYSE American as part of market positioning strategy.

news.summary: Osisko Metals has recently made a move from British Columbia, where it was previously registered under the Business Corporations Act, to Ontario, where it is now registered under the Business Corporations Act. This transition indicates a strategic shift for the company, potentially driven by business opportunities or regulatory benefits in Ontario. The switch reflects a movement of corporate headquarters and legal registration, symbolizing a significant change for the organization. This relocation will likely impact the company's operational and legal framework.
news.headline: Osisko Metals moves from British Columbia to Ontario, following a Continuance process completion.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in the last five years. This positive development has been attributed to an increase in job availability, with 350,000 new jobs created in the last quarter alone. Additionally, it was noted that the average salary for workers has also seen a modest increase of 3.5% compared to the previous year. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, bringing further improvements to the labor market.
news.headline: Picton Mahoney Asset Management reveals new fund names, revised ticker symbol, and updated risk ratings.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Bombardier Inc. revealed the redemption of US$500 million principal of its 7.875% Senior Notes due 2027. This redemption was in line with the notice of partial redemption distributed on May 14, 2025.
news.headline: Bombardier redeems US$500 million of 7.875% Senior Notes due 2027, per May 14 notice.

news.summary: Info-Tech LIVE 2025 in Las Vegas wrapped up its third and last day by focusing on vital leadership insights, innovative AI strategies, and transformative playbooks to steer IT organizations through rapid change in the upcoming year. The event took place in Las Vegas and concluded on June 13, 2025, highlighting key trends and tactics for managing exponential change in the IT industry.
news.headline: Info-Tech LIVE 2025 Day 3 in Las Vegas, focused on AI and Quantum, with key insights for IT orgs on managing change.

news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has recently announced the recruitment of a high-profile individual as part of its staff. The newcomer has an impressive track record, having served as the global head of institutional markets at Blockchain.com and as a partner at a prominent law firm in Washington, DC. This appointment signifies the SEC's commitment to bolstering its workforce with experienced professionals from the finance and legal sectors, enhancing its capabilities in overseeing the market and enforcing regulations. This move demonstrates the importance the SEC places on having top-tier talent within its ranks to effectively carry out its regulatory responsibilities in the financial industry.
news.headline: Ex-Blockchain exec becomes SEC's new trading and markets director, along with a Washington, DC lawyer.

news.summary: A law firm based in Newtown, Pennsylvania, known as Edelson Lechtzin LLP, has launched an investigation on June 13, 2025, regarding possible breaches of federal securities laws by GeneDx Holdings Corp. ("GeneDx") traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol WGS. The investigation stems from accusations that GeneDx may have supplied deceptive business details that could mislead investors.
news.headline: Edelson Lechtzin LLP investigates GeneDx Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: WGS) for securities violations. Investors with losses urged to contact.

news.summary: A prominent provider of luxury vacation rentals has introduced an enterprise property management system to elevate service delivery throughout renowned destinations in the United States. Operating out of Cottage Grove, Minnesota, Track, a top player in cloud-based hospitality software solutions, disclosed that Natural Retreats has implemented their system. This move, unveiled on June 13, 2025, is aimed at enhancing customer service across various iconic U.S. locations.
news.headline: Natural Retreats partners with Track Hospitality Software to enhance guest experience at US destinations.

news.summary: Experienced Leader Enhances Berwyn's Healthcare Strategy INDEPENDENCE, Ohio, June 13, 2025 - The Berwyn Group (Berwyn), known for its expertise in death audit, locate services, and population management, has appointed Adam Wilson to bolster their team. Wilson, a veteran in the industry, brings a wealth of knowledge to the company, aiming to further develop Berwyn's healthcare strategy.
news.headline: Adam Wilson appointed as GM of Healthcare at Berwyn Group, a leader in death audit & population management.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Vaxart, Inc. held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders in a virtual format. The clinical-stage biotechnology company, trading under Nasdaq as VXRT, is known for developing oral recombinant pill vaccines using its unique delivery platform. Results from the meeting show that out of the presented proposals, two were accepted while two were turned down by Vaxart stockholders. This meeting indicates the investors' stance on crucial decisions within the Company.
news.headline: Vaxart reports results of Annual Meeting - 2 proposals approved, 2 rejected by stockholders.

news.summary: Survey findings released on June 13, 2025 from Arlington, Va., indicate a notable change in the approaches of life science labs towards challenges like worldwide economic instability, increasing operational expenses, and impending U.S. tariff regulations. The data, compiled from over 550 participants in academia and the private sector, sheds light on shifting trends in the industry.
news.headline: Life science labs are adapting to economic pressures with shifting strategies, surveyed 550+ researchers.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in the number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 in the country. As per the latest data, the total number of confirmed cases has surged to over 200,000, with more than 5,000 new cases reported in the last 24 hours alone. This concerning rise in infections has prompted authorities to implement stricter preventive measures to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, the death toll has sadly climbed to 4,000, underscoring the severity of the situation. Healthcare facilities are reportedly under immense strain due to the surge in cases, with hospitals running out of beds and medical supplies. The government is urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and restrictions to help contain the outbreak.Officials have also announced plans to ramp up vaccination efforts, with a target of inoculating 70% of the population by the end of the year. Despite these challenges, there is hope that with collective efforts and cooperation, the country will be able to overcome this crisis and emerge stronger.
news.headline: Israeli PM Netanyahu delivers speech to Iranian citizens.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global smartphone market witnessed a 12% decline in shipments in the first quarter of 2020 compared to the same period last year. The total number of smartphones shipped was approximately 275 million units. Despite this overall decrease, some companies such as Samsung and Huawei were able to increase their market share. Samsung shipped around 59 million units, while Huawei shipped 49 million units during this period. On the other hand, Apple experienced a 8% decrease in shipments, with a total of 37 million units shipped. The impact of the COVID-19 pandemic was cited as a major factor in the decline of smartphone shipments worldwide.
news.headline: Google undergoing antitrust review for plan to acquire security firm Wiz.
